name: hilbert
description: Axiomatic Program Builder + Sorry Completion Engine — Formalizes research programs into Lean 4 axiomatic frameworks AND automatically closes sorry gaps via 10-hypothesis autoresearch ratchet loop.

leanbert.description: LeanBERT GAN latent-space tactic generator + NeuroSymbolicCritic scoring

deepseek_prover_671b.description: Premium 671B MoE escalation for extreme-difficulty sorrys

skills.name: axiomatize_field
skills.description: Distill empirical results and known theorems into a coherent Lean 4 axiomatic system.

skills.name: identify_open_problems
skills.description: Enumerate and rank open problems in a mathematical field, with difficulty scores and Lean 4 blueprint stubs.

skills.name: propose_research_program
skills.description: Compose a formal research program blueprint with milestones, A2A delegations, and Lean 4 skeleton proofs.

skills.name: scan_sorrys
skills.description: Scan Lean 4 codebase for sorry gaps and axiom stubs, with difficulty classification and Mathlib replacement lookup.

skills.name: complete_sorrys
skills.description: Automatically close sorry gaps using 10-hypothesis autoresearch pipeline: LeanBERT (3) + DeepSeek-Prover-V2-7B (4) + Gemini Deep-Think (3). Includes ratchet retry and LeanBERT latent-space probability scoring.
